title: senecio davuricus
intro: Senecio davuricus, also known as the Asian wormwood or Korean wormwood, is a plant species within the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Senecio davuricus include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an insect repellent. In herbal preparations, Senecio davuricus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
